name: Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Crushed Unsweetened Pineapple, packed in own juice. Do not Drain.
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine apple slices and all ingredients except butter.
Mix together.
2. Pour into an unbaked bottom crust.
3. Dot with butter.
4. Top with a vented or lattice crust.
5. Bake at 425 degrees F for 15 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 350 degrees F and continue baking for 25 to 35 minutes,
or until the crust is golden brown.
The pineapple used has no sugar added. It is the size of a tuna can, about
7 or 8 oz.
